name: Tomato Onion Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork chops in a nonstick skillet, turning occasionally for about 5 minutes.
2. Remove the chops and drain any excess fat from the skillet. Wipe out the pan and set aside the chops.
3. In a separate step, braise-deglaze the pan with water to cook until softened and golden.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the skillet and stir constantly.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and return the chops to the skillet.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
7. Spoon sauce over the chops.
